# Feature: Guided Tours Persistence on Scan

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Close guided tours v1 gap: `tours.json` is written during `autoguide scan`, and the example app consumes persisted tour data via `TourRunner`.

## Preconditions
- Scan produces `flows.json` with at least one flow
- `generateToursFromFlows` and `validateTours` exist in `@autoguide/core`

## Happy Path
- [ ] `autoguide scan` invokes `generateToursFromFlows` and writes `.autoguide/tours.json`
- [ ] Tour validation fails scan when tours are malformed
- [ ] Scan on hr-workflows fixture produces at least one tour
- [ ] `examples/react-vite` loads tours from fixture (scan-shaped) and `TourRunner` uses persisted tour id

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty flows produce empty `tours.json` array (valid)
- [ ] `autoguide generate tours` still works as explicit rebuild path

## Regression
- [ ] Existing `generate.test.ts` and `tours.test.ts` pass
- [ ] Example app still renders Tour button in published mode

## Assumptions
- DocElement anchors use `data-doc-id`; tour step `elementId` maps to `[data-doc-id="…"]` selector
- Example app loads JSON fixture mirroring post-scan output (browser cannot read `.autoguide/` directly)

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — `generateToursFromFlows` + `validateTours`, writes `tours.json`
- `packages/core/src/tours/generate.ts` — `elementId` maps to `[data-doc-id="…"]` selector
- `examples/react-vite/fixtures/tours.json` — scan-shaped tour fixture for `TourRunner`
- `examples/react-vite/src/main.tsx` — loads tours from fixture instead of inline mock
- Tests: `generate.test.ts` (scan writes tours), `tours.test.ts` (elementId selector)
